description.en: The Companies Registry is a government department under the Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. It provides comprehensive company registration and business registration services, maintaining a centralized database of all registered companies in Hong Kong through the Integrated Companies Registry Information System (ICRIS).
description.zh: 香港公司注册处是香港特别行政区财经事务及库务局辖下的政府部门，负责公司注册及商业登记事务，通过公司注册处综合资讯系统（ICRIS）维护香港所有注册公司的集中数据库。

en: Company registration information: company name (English and Chinese), registration number, incorporation date, company type, and legal status
Registered office address and principal place of business
Statutory documents and filings: annual returns (NAR1), changes in directors (ND2A), changes in registered office (NM1)
Company incorporation certificates and business registration certificates
Historical changes and updates to company information
zh: 公司注册资料：公司名称（中英文）、注册编号、成立日期、公司类型及法律状态
注册办事处地址及主要营业地点
法定文件及申报表：周年申报表（NAR1）、董事变更（ND2A）、注册办事处变更（NM1）
公司注册证书及商业登记证
公司撤销注册及清盘记录
公司资料的历史变更记录
